subject: feat(icons): adopt Google Material Symbols signature glyph
body:
Replaces the hand-Béziered signature attempt with the Material Symbols
`signature` glyph — a designer-polished cursive flourish + "sign here" X
mark + dotted baseline that carries three signature semantics in one
icon. Recoloured via `business.accent` token on `business.base-300`, so
the glyph opts into our DaisyUI palette the same way every other color
in the app does.

- `public/icon-source.svg` — Material path preserved unchanged, wrapped
  in a `<g transform>` to fit our 1024×1024 canvas within the 80%
  maskable safe zone. Only the fill attribute uses our token.
- `THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md` — Apache 2.0 attribution for the glyph.
  Apache 2.0 is GPL-3.0-compatible (our project licence).
- `CLAUDE.md` APP_ICONS section updated to reflect the new design and
  pointer to the notices file.

Tags: ui, icons, licensing
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: theme-system
Semver: patch
